name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship (NMMS)
eligibility: Class 8 students from government schools, family income below 1.5 lakh/year
description: Scholarship to arrest dropout at Class 8 level and encourage meritorious students to continue education up to Class 12.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
eligibility: SC students studying in Class 11 and above, family income below 2.5 lakh/year
description: Financial assistance for SC students pursuing post-matric education.

name: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister's Scholarship
eligibility: Students scoring above 90% in Class 12 from Tamil Nadu state board
description: Rewarding academic excellence for Tamil Nadu board students.

name: Pragati Scholarship for Girls (AICTE)
eligibility: Girl students admitted to AICTE approved technical diploma/degree programs
description: Empowering girl students pursuing technical education.

name: Inspire Scholarship (DST)
eligibility: Top 1% in Class 12 board exams, pursuing BSc/integrated MSc in natural sciences
description: For students who choose natural sciences at undergraduate level.

name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship
eligibility: Minority girl students (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Parsi) in Class 9-12
description: Supporting minority girl students to continue their education.

name: NSP Central Sector Scholarship
eligibility: Students above 80th percentile in Class 12, pursuing undergraduate courses, income below 4.5 lakh/year
amount: 12000 per year for first 3 years, 20000 in 4th/5th year
description: Merit-based scholarship for regular students pursuing higher education.
